name: find_file
description: Search for files in the project by name or partial name. Returns matching file paths. Useful for locating scripts, assets, or any project file before reading or editing it.

query.description: The file name or partial name to search for, e.g. 'CubeEnemy', 'Spawner', 'PlayerController.cs'.

extension.description: Optional. Filter by file extension, e.g. 'cs', 'asset', 'mat', 'prefab', 'json'.

folder.description: Optional. Folder to search in, e.g. 'Assets/Scripts'. Defaults to the entire Assets folder.
